name: Apex Freestyle 5"
description: The quintessential 5-inch freestyle quad. Built around the proven TBS Source One V6 frame and Axisflying 2207.5 motors on 6S, this build delivers explosive power and predictable handling for flips, rolls, power loops, and proximity flying. HAKRC F722 stack keeps things simple with a single-board FC+ESC solution. Analog 5.8GHz video keeps weight down and latency minimal. ELRS 2.4GHz for rock-solid control link. The go-to build for pilots stepping up from beginner quads or building their first custom rig.

name: Venom Racer 5"
description: Purpose-built 5-inch race quad optimized for gate speed and low lap times. The HGLRC MY5 frame sheds every unnecessary gram while maintaining crash durability. High-KV 2207 2120KV motors paired with a 60A ESC deliver instant throttle response on 6S. Separate FC and ESC allow individual replacement after race crashes. Lightweight analog video system and RadioMaster ELRS nano receiver keep the all-up weight under 300g dry. Built for competitive MultiGP and FAI racing.

name: Cloudwalker HD 5"
description: Premium 5-inch HD freestyle build designed for pilots who want crystal-clear digital video without sacrificing flight performance. The FlyFishRC Volador II VX5 frame is specifically engineered for DJI O4/Walksnail camera mounting. Axisflying Argus ECO stack pairs an F4 FC with a 60A ESC for reliable power delivery. Walksnail Avatar HD Pro camera feeds stunning 1080p video to your goggles. True diversity ELRS receiver ensures bulletproof link in urban and mountain environments. This is the build for YouTube-quality FPV footage.
video_system: Walksnail Avatar HD Pro 1080p digital FPV

specs.video_system: Walksnail Avatar HD Pro 1080p digital FPV

name: Horizon Scout 7" Long Range
description: 7-inch long range explorer built for 20+ minute flights and 10+ km range. VCI Hobby ARES 2808 1350KV motors spin efficient 7-inch props at low RPM for maximum flight time on 6S Li-Ion packs. H743 flight controller runs GPS Rescue for automatic return-to-home on signal loss. Flywoo GOKU GPS module provides fast satellite fix. ELRS true diversity receiver on 2.4GHz ensures control link integrity at distance. HDZero video system delivers low-latency digital video. This is a serious long range platform for pilots exploring mountain ranges, coastlines, and backcountry terrain.
video_system: Digital FPV (DJI O3 Air Unit or Walksnail)

specs.video_system: Digital FPV (DJI O3 Air Unit or Walksnail)

name: Voyager LR6 6" Cruiser
description: Efficient 6-inch long range cruiser optimized for smooth cinematic flights and maximum endurance. Lumenier 2307 JohnnyFPV V3 Pro motors deliver silky-smooth throttle response at low KV, perfect for cinematic orbits and long glides. 6S Li-Ion battery pack provides 15-25 minute flight times depending on flying style. GPS rescue and ELRS long range link provide safety margin for flights beyond visual line of sight. Designed for pilots who prioritize flight time and video quality over acrobatic performance.

name: Atlas X 10" CineLifter
description: Heavy-lift 10-inch cinelifter designed to carry full-size cinema cameras (GoPro, Sony A6000, RED Komodo) for professional aerial cinematography. iFlight XING2 3110 motors at 900KV provide massive torque on 6S while maintaining efficiency. Lumenier Siege 80A ESC handles the sustained high-current draw of large propellers under camera payload. Lumenier LUX H743 FC with dual IMU provides rock-solid stabilization. 9-inch MacroQuad propellers generate enormous thrust with low noise. This platform is for commercial filmmakers and cinema FPV operators who need reliability and payload capacity above all else.

name: Stealth Hawk 5" Premium
description: No-compromise premium 5-inch freestyle build using top-tier components throughout. Orqa QuadCore H7 FC with ICM42688 IMU for the cleanest gyro data and fastest PID loop processing. Holybro Tekko32 65A AM32 ESC provides headroom for aggressive flying with zero desync risk. Axisflying 2207.5 motors deliver consistent performance session after session. HDZero Freestyle V2 digital video for the lowest latency HD feed available. True diversity ELRS ensures control link never drops. Built for experienced pilots who demand the absolute best from every component.
video_system: DJI O3 Air Unit digital FPV

specs.video_system: DJI O3 Air Unit digital FPV

name: First Flight 5" Beginner
description: Budget-friendly 5-inch freestyle build designed as the ideal first custom drone. Every component is chosen for reliability, ease of assembly, and forgiveness during the learning curve. HAKRC F722 stack simplifies wiring with a single FC+ESC board. Foxeer Micro Cat 4 camera and SpeedyBee TX800 VTX provide solid analog video at a fraction of digital system costs. Lower-KV 1960KV motors on 6S give smooth, predictable power delivery that won't catch beginners off guard. Total build cost under $250 USD excluding battery and radio equipment. Perfect for pilots graduating from simulators to real flight.

name: CineMaster 7" Cinema
description: 7-inch cinematic platform tuned for buttery-smooth footage. T-Motor VELOX V2808 cinematic motors at 1300KV deliver ultra-smooth throttle response with minimal vibration, critical for jello-free video. Lumenier Siege 80A ESC provides ample current headroom for the larger props. Gemfan Hurricane 7050 tri-blade props balanced for cinema work. The entire build philosophy prioritizes low vibration, smooth power delivery, and long flight times over raw acrobatic performance. Ideal for real estate, commercial, and nature cinematography shoots.

name: ThunderBolt 5" Power
description: High-power 5-inch build for pilots who want maximum thrust-to-weight ratio. VCI Hobby Yuki Savage 2207 2120KV motors paired with Holybro Tekko32 65A AM32 ESC deliver explosive acceleration and instant throttle response. Higher KV motors on 6S push the power envelope, requiring a beefy ESC to match. Orqa QuadCore H7 FC processes the fastest PID loops for locked-in handling at extreme speeds. This is the build for power loops, juicy flicks, and aggressive proximity flying where raw power makes the difference.

name: Nomad Explorer 7" Ultra LR
description: Ultra long range 7-inch explorer built for maximum distance and flight time. EMAX ECO II 2807 1300KV motors spin 7-inch bi-blade props at the efficiency sweet spot for 6S Li-Ion packs. Lumenier NAV 6000mAh 6S 18650 Li-Ion battery provides 25-35 minute flight times in cruise. GPS rescue with compass-equipped Flywoo GOKU Pro module ensures safe return from beyond visual range. ELRS true diversity 2.4GHz receiver maintains control link at 15+ km. Every component choice prioritizes range and endurance over performance. For mountain crossings, coastline exploration, and pushing the boundaries of what a quad can reach.

name: Phantom 6" Digital LR
description: Premium 6-inch digital long range cruiser combining HD video quality with extended range capability. Ethix Mr Steele Stout 2307 V5 1950KV motors provide the perfect balance of efficiency and responsiveness for 6-inch props on 6S. HDZero Freestyle V2 digital video delivers the lowest-latency HD feed for confident flying at distance. Compass-equipped GPS module enables position-aware features and GPS rescue. iFlight BLITZ H743 FC handles GPS processing, RPM filtering, and HD OSD simultaneously without breaking a sweat. For pilots who want the best video quality on a long range platform.

Aviation Week reports 1,200hp PT6A engine. combat_use: ['IDF ISTAR operations', 'India border surveillance'] export_customers: ['Germany', 'India']

funding.note: IAI Heron TP is IDF-primary MALE platform; state-funded R&D

name: UVision Air UVision Hero Family
description: Specs shown are for Hero-120 (most widely adopted variant). Hero-120 selected by US Army for LMAMS. Full family spans 3-125 kg across 6+ variants. Each variant scales warhead and range for different echelons. combat_use: ['Israel/IDF', 'Azerbaijan (Nagorno-Karabakh — unconfirmed)'] export_customers: ['United States (LMAMS program)', 'multiple undisclosed'] ai_autonomy: True

funding.uvision_private: UVision Air — privately held Israeli defense company
funding.rheinmetall_partnership: Joint venture with Rheinmetall for European market (Hero Family EU)
funding.note: No public funding data available; private Israeli company

name: Nomadium Robotics TerraHawk
description: Other products in pipeline: TerraPOD, FarSight, Sentinel (names visible in nav, no public specs yet).

compliance.note: EU C2 and C6 certification pending, expected Q3 2026. Developer Kit exempt under EU Regulation 2018/1139 Article 2(3)(a) for police, military, SAR, border control, firefighting.

funding.accelerator: Scion Earth Accelerator (powered by Rezolv Energy)
funding.notes: Bulgarian startup. Strategic partners: Scion Earth, Rezolv Energy, Tectonic 3D, ID Robots.

production.method: In-house additive manufacturing (3D printing) with military-grade filaments
production.notes: Additive manufacturing enables competitive cost vs fiberglass composites

gcs.skyhub: Cloud-based fleet manager — 4G + satellite, web interface, live video. €400 + €20/mo
gcs.tactical_rc_tablet: SIYI MK15 / SIYI RC10 Pro, 10-40km range, live video. €700-€2100

name: Skycutter SC-ISR — Quadcopter ISR Platform
description: Quadcopter ISR platform with 75 min endurance, 100 kph speed, 666 Wh battery, 40x zoom EO + 6x thermal camera. UK-manufactured.

name: Skycutter SC-Orca — One-Way Effector
description: Autonomous one-way attack effector. GPS-independent strike capability. Designed for contested EW environments.

name: Skycutter SC Gryphon — Heavy-Lift Hexacopter
description: Hexacopter with 25 kg MTOW, 5 kg payload for 1+ hr endurance. Hydrogen fuel cell option for 2-hr endurance.

name: Napatree Bumblebee — AI-Guided FPV Attack Quadcopter
description: FPV attack quadcopter with 70%+ autonomous direct-hit rate. AI target recognition (soldiers, bunkers, vehicles, drones). VIO jam-resistant navigation. Redundant comms including internet-based control. 1,000+ combat flights against Russian targets by spring 2025.

name: Napatree Hornet — Fixed-Wing Strike Drone
description: Fixed-wing strike drone. ~2m wingspan. 11 lbs (5 kg) payload. 62 mph cruise. 90+ mile range. Planned production: 6,000+ units/month.

name: Napatree MEROPS AS3 Surveyor — C-UAS Interceptor
description: Fixed-wing C-UAS interceptor targeting Shahed-type drones. ~$14,500/unit. Up to 95% hit rate. 1,900+ intercepts of Russian drones by Nov 2025. Deployed with Poland, Romania, Denmark, NATO. Pentagon deploying to Middle East for Operation Epic Fury.

name: Nokturnal AI Nightmare — Blue UAS FPV Strike Drone
description: Blue UAS Certified FPV strike drone with advanced onboard autonomy and terminal guidance. Best-in-class anti-jam digital radio link. Selected for DIU Project G.I. alongside Auterion, ModalAI, Neros.

name: Nokturnal AI Unruly — Long-Range Fixed-Wing Strike
description: Long-range fixed-wing strike platform with advanced visual navigation and conditional behavior logic. GPS-denied, no RF comms required. 100-300 km deep-strike capability.

name: Nokturnal AI Menace — High-Speed Jet Strike
description: Blended-wing turbine jet. High-speed/high-impact. Day/night navigation. GPS-independent with no RF comms required.

name: HALO Aeronautics PERSES — Disposable FPV Attack Drone
description: Low-cost disposable FPV quadcopter. Flight-ready in <1 minute. Lower noise than standard drones. Modular payload. Joint venture between Hush Aerospace (UAS manufacturer) and By Light Professional IT Services (1,000+ employees).

name: HALO Aeronautics HALO-6 VTOL — Long-Endurance ISR
description: 6m wingspan VTOL with 10 hr endurance, 76 mph cruise, 27.22 kg payload. Triple-redundant autopilot. Carbon fiber. Ultra-low acoustic signature. Encrypted comms.

name: UDD F10 — China-Free FPV Attack Quadcopter
description: FPV attack quadcopter with fully China-free supply chain. Domestically manufactured carbon frames, antennas, FCs, ESCs, radio modems, and video TX. Selected by Pentagon 'largely due to highly successful supply chain localization.' NYT: 'Ukraine Reaches a Milestone: Making China-Free Drones.'

name: UDD F7 — Front-Line FPV Attack Drone
description: Recognized as 'most effective weapon on the front lines' by Ukraine's Army of Drones program (end of 2025). Widely used by Ukrainian Armed Forces in active combat.

name: Neros Archer Fiber — NDAA-Compliant Fiber-Optic FPV
description: World's first NDAA-compliant fiber-optic FPV drone. Partnership with Kela Technologies. Inherently immune to RF jamming and EW. Fiber-optic cable control.

name: Vector Defense Hammer — 10-inch Fiber-Optic FPV
description: First-to-market FPV with fiber-optic integration (5,000m spool). Immune to RF jamming. Gimbaled camera detecting threats at 20 km. Droppable or one-way kinetic payloads. DIU Blue and Green List approved.

name: Swarm Defense KIWI — Stackable OWA Drone
description: One-way attack drone. 10+ km range. Modular payload. Stackable form factor. <2 lbs. Takes <5 minutes to build. Single operator can deploy thousands via proprietary swarm software. 72,000 units/year capacity scaling to 250,000+.

name: General Cherry Bullet Interceptor — High-Speed C-UAS
description: Counter-UAS interceptor exceeding 300 km/h. Designed to intercept Shahed-type drones. Part of General Cherry's 33 codified defense products. 100,000 drones/month production capacity.

name: Auterion Nemyx — Cross-Platform Swarm Strike Engine
description: Cross-platform swarm strike engine introduced September 2025. Enables coordinated autonomous strikes across multiple drone types. 33,000 AI strike kits deployed under $50M Pentagon contract for Ukraine — largest deployment of autonomous technology in the West.

name: KrattWorks DART Fixed Wing Aerial Target
description: Fixed wing aerial target drone for heavy machine gun, anti-aircraft cannon, and air defense missile live-fire training. Double the speed of typical glider targets at up to 50 m/s (110 mph), no catapult required. Optional smoke generators, IR-tracers, VTOL, and X-band radar reflectors. Used by Estonian Defence Forces.

compliance.note: Estonian company. Made in EU. Used by Estonian Defence Forces.

name: KrattWorks DART-R Flying Wing
description: Long-range flying wing aerial target and decoy with optional X or S-band radar reflectors. Very low default radar cross-section, configurable to high-RCS decoy. 100km one-way range, 200km/h max speed, 45-minute endurance. No catapult required. Payload options include passive/active radar reflectors, smoke generator, IR-flare, and missed distance indicator.

specs.payload_options: Passive/active radar reflector (X or S band), smoke generator, IR-flare, missed distance indicator, high-RCS decoy configuration

name: KrattWorks PARM Aerial Target Quadcopter
description: Cost-effective aerial target quadcopter for counter-drone drills and heavy machine gun/autocannon live-fire training. One GCS controls entire fleet — standard set is 5 or 10 drones with shared charging station for 10 batteries. Optional FPV camera for simulated drone warfare exercises. Used by Estonian Defence Forces.

specs.multi_drone_control: Single GCS controls all PARM drones
specs.standard_set: 5 or 10 drones + 10-battery charging station + 1 remote + 1 tablet

compliance.note: Estonian company. Made in EU. Used by Estonian Defence Forces.

name: EchoMAV MONARK UAS
description: Lightweight modular tactical quadrotor designed for ISR and payload delivery. 900g airframe (1.8kg RTF) with 42-minute hover endurance, 1kg payload capacity, and universal release/gripper. NDAA-compliant electronics, 3D-printed field-repairable chassis, modular radio bay (Herelink, Microhard, Doodle, optional 5G). Supports EchoTherm 320/FLIR Boson 640 thermal cameras. ArduPilot-based EchoMAV SBX autopilot with RPi CM4/5, optical flow GPS-denied nav, and ATAK UAS Tool compatibility.

compliance.note: NDAA-compliant electronics. US manufacturer (Lubbock, TX). RTF available to government entities only.

thermal_sensor: EchoTherm 320 or FLIR Boson 320/640 (via EchoMAV Fermion dual EO/thermal module)
video_system: EchoMAV Fermion dual EO/IR; h.264/h.265; MIPI-CSI2 + USB 2/3

specs.interfaces: Ethernet, UART, I2C, GPIO, CAN, PWM, USB 3.0 x2

name: EchoMAV MK1 VTOL UAS
description: Long-persistence VTOL UAS with hybrid propulsion (2-cycle ICE + electric starter/generator). 100-mile encrypted BVLOS range, 80x zoom EO with 360° gimbal, 1280x720 thermal sensor, EchoPilot AI compute (Nvidia Jetson), patented MAVNet LTE/SATCOM cloud connectivity. Optional VectorNAV INS for GPS-denied ops. NDAA Sec. 838 compliant, up to FIPS 140-3 depending on comms config. Packs into 48x20x17" Pelican case.

compliance.note: NDAA Sec. 838 compliant. US manufacturer (Lubbock TX).

video_system: 80x zoom EO + thermal; 360° gimbal; encrypted telemetry + video link

specs.comms: Highly encrypted telemetry + video; BVLOS to 100 miles

name: Cleo Dronut DD1
description: Palm-sized toroidal rotor indoor drone. GPS-denied autonomous navigation via ModalAI VOXL. Designed for confined spaces, ships, tunnels, collapsed buildings. Primary customer: US SOCOM.

name: Easy Aerial SAMS Tethered
description: Tethered autonomous multi-mission system (SAMS). Unlimited flight time via ground power tether. Blue UAS listed. Used for border security, base protection, critical infrastructure persistent ISR.

name: Ascent AeroSystems Spirit
description: Coaxial rotor cylindrical UAS. Acquired by Robinson Helicopter Apr 2024 — now built at Robinson's Torrance CA facility. All-weather capable. No Chinese components. SOCOM interest for maritime and adverse-weather ops. Robinson crewed-uncrewed teaming vision.

name: Harris Aerial Carrier H6
description: DJI-free heavy-lift hexacopter. Huntsville AL manufacture near Redstone Arsenal. Supports LiDAR, large-format cameras. NDAA-focused BOM. Strong Army program pipeline.

name: Hylio AG-410
description: Heavy-duty agricultural sprayer. 41L tank. US-owned and operated. Sold direct and through Frontier Precision. USDA program eligible.

name: Skyfront Perimeter 8
description: Hybrid-electric gasoline-battery octocopter. 5+ hour flight time. Blue UAS listed April 2025. LiDAR survey, utility inspection, long-range monitoring. Frontier Precision authorized dealer.

name: ACSL SOTEN
description: Japanese-made NDAA/Blue UAS compliant enterprise drone. Swappable RGB/thermal/multispectral payloads. $7K-14K (GOV/MIL). Teledyne FLIR SAMO thermal. Global shutter camera. No Chinese components.

name: Quantum-Systems Vector
description: German VTOL fixed-wing. Blue UAS Cleared List. Bundeswehr operator. No Chinese components confirmed. 2-hour endurance for ISR and survey. NATO ally manufacture.

name: Censys Sentaero BVLOS
description: US-made BVLOS fixed-wing platform. FAA BEYOND program participant. Infrastructure inspection, pipeline monitoring, DOT surveys. NDAA compliant.

name: Vision Aerial VERTEX
description: US-made heavy-lift octocopter. 40lb+ payload capacity. Blue UAS listed. Modular payload bay. LiDAR, large format camera, and defense payload capable.

name: Flock Alpha DFR
description: US-built DFR drone for Flock Aerodome system. BVLOS capable, 400ft AGL ops. Thermal + HD + zoom + night vision. Auto-launch in <90s. Covers 38 sq mi per dock. Flock911 integration.

name: ModalAI Starling 2
description: VOXL 2 powered autonomous drone. Starling 2 Logis variant for warehouse inventory. GPS-denied navigation. Blue UAS Framework core FC supplier powering Teal, Cleo Dronut, and other platforms.

name: Freefly Alta X

compliance.note: DIU Blue UAS listed. Alta X (DIU Blue Package) SKU 950-00113-Blue. COO=US on platform.

description: Freefly Alta X is a heavy-lift octocopter capable of carrying payloads up to 15.9 kg. DIU Blue UAS listed, NDAA-compliant. Used in cinema, mapping, and defense applications. Runs ArduPilot or PX4. US-manufactured in Boulder, CO.

name: Freefly Alta Pro

compliance.note: US-manufactured. Not on current DIU Blue UAS list. NDAA-compliant by COO.

description: Freefly Alta Pro is an 8-motor heavy-lift platform designed for cinema and commercial applications. US-manufactured, NDAA-compliant. Runs ArduPilot. Predecessor to Alta X.

name: Freefly Astro Map

compliance.note: Astro Map + Pilot Pro (Herelink RF) SKU 950-00106-02 COO=US. Blue UAS listed.

description: Freefly Astro Map is the mapping-optimized variant of the Astro platform. Includes RTK GPS, mapping payload, and Pilot Pro controller. Blue UAS listed. COO=US. Runs Auterion Enterprise PX4.

name: Ascent AeroSystems Spirit K257B
description: World's first commercial-grade coaxial sUAV. ArduCopter/MAVLink on Pixhawk Cube. IP56, modular quick-connect payload system. 12S 44.4V nominal. ECCN 9A012.

name: Skydio X10
description: US-made autonomous quadrotor. FLIR Boson+ thermal, 50/64/48MP cameras. Blue UAS, NDAA. IP55. RAS-A/MAVLink, ATAK. 5G optional. 40-min flight time.

name: Draganfly Apex
description: Compact, transportable multirotor designed for military and law enforcement surveillance. North American-manufactured derivative of the Commander 3XL. Integrates CubePilot autopilot (triple-redundant IMU, Blue UAS certified), quick-release exchangeable payload bay, optional NVIDIA Jetson edge compute for onboard AI/CV, and COFDM interference-resistant comms. Folding arms and props for rapid deployment from transport case.

compliance.note: North American manufactured. CubePilot autopilot is Blue UAS certified. NDAA compliance unverified at platform level.
North American manufactured. CubePilot Blue UAS certified. Platform-level NDAA status unverified.

specs.form_factor: Folding arms and props, transportable case

name: Draganfly Commander 3XL
description: High-endurance, weather-resistant multirotor known as the 'Swiss Army Knife of Drones.' Rectangular tube fuselage packs into a transport case with quick-release arms, folding props, and retractable landing gear. CubePilot autopilot (triple-redundant IMU, Blue UAS certified). Supports automated and manual flight. 360° unobstructed payload view. Integrated with Doodle Labs Helix Mesh Rider and UXV SRoC GCS in defense config.

compliance.note: North American manufactured. CubePilot Blue UAS certified. Used by RCMP, U.S. Army ISR, demining ops.
North American manufactured. CubePilot Blue UAS certified.

contracts.program: Doodle Labs / UXV Technologies defense integration
Babcock International / CiTech APAC defense collaboration

gcs.c2_link: P2P, LTE, Doodle Labs Helix Mesh Rider (anti-jam)

name: Draganfly Heavy Lift
description: Heavy-duty industrial multirotor for cargo delivery, large-sensor surveys, and BVLOS ops. Intelligent battery management supports 4/6/8 battery configs to trade payload vs endurance. Universal Mounting System clamps payloads up to 30kg. LTE-enabled BVLOS. Delivery box fits 15x17x34in parcels. Used by Revived Soldiers Ukraine for humanitarian delivery. Teledyne LiDAR and Gremsy VIO EO/IR payload compatible.

compliance.note: North American manufactured. CubePilot Blue UAS certified. Ukraine humanitarian deployment.

contracts.note: Medical supply delivery Ukraine conflict zone

name: Draganfly Commander 3XL Hybrid
description: Hybrid gas-electric multirotor on the Commander 3XL airframe. Draganfuel Ignite 70cc liquid-cooled powertrain (4000W, gasoline or heavy fuel). Autonomous engine start and regulation. Onboard diagnostics with continuous monitoring. Overcomes remote charging and battery logistics. Unveiled at Commercial UAV Expo Sep 2023.

compliance.note: North American manufactured. CubePilot Blue UAS certified.

specs.propulsion: Draganfuel Ignite 70cc (4000W hybrid, gas or heavy fuel)

name: Draganfly Commander2
description: High-endurance electric sUAS on patented carbon-fiber folding airframe. RTK-ready. Interchangeable payloads: RGB with 10x optical zoom, MicaSense multispectral, FLIR thermal IR, hyperspectral (Corning). Supports fully and semi-automated MAVLink missions plus manual flight. Ideal for agriculture, aerial 3D modeling, mapping, public safety. Draganfly engineers custom sensor integration on request.
video_system: RGB 10x optical zoom / FLIR thermal / multispectral / hyperspectral

name: Draganflyer Tango2
description: High-endurance tandem-wing fixed-wing sUAS with catapult launch. Dual battery (99Wh Li-Ion x2, expandable to 4 batteries). Intelligent power management system. Nacelle pusher design enables slow flight for high image resolution. High-lift wing enables steep takeoff/landing — operable from short runways and clearings. Modular payload bay: RGB, thermal IR, multispectral, LiDAR, hyperspectral. Wingspan 2000mm.

compliance.note: North American manufactured. Legacy product, still listed.

name: Draganfly Starling X.2
description: Commander 3XL airframe with Promo Drone's patent-pending LED display payload system. Single or dual-screen configuration — vivid aerial displays for advertising, events, emergency messaging, and public safety comms. Single-screen config: standard Commander 3XL flight time. Dual-screen config: 18 min. Applications: emergency alerts, evacuation notices, missing persons, event advertising, sports highlights, disaster comms rally point.
video_system: LED display payload (single or dual screen)

compliance.note: Commander 3XL base — North American mfg, CubePilot Blue UAS certified.

specs.payload: Promo Drone patent-pending LED display (single or dual screen)

name: DraganScout
description: Morphing-wheel ground robot with patented folding wheel design. Switches between round wheels (fast movement) and stair-climbing/vertical-standing configurations on the fly. Telescopic payload arm for elevated sensor deployment. Multi-mission capable: ground surveillance, stair climbing, vertical positioning. Operated via same Universal Control System (UCS) as Draganfly multirotor fleet.

name: Percepto Sparrow
description: Autonomous drone-in-a-box for industrial inspection. Multirotor platform integrated with Percepto's AIM (Autonomous Inspection & Monitoring) software. Operates from a self-contained dock with no pilot required. Used by US utilities, energy, and critical infrastructure. Israeli company — NOT on Blue UAS cleared list. NDAA status unverified for federal procurement.

compliance.note: Israeli company — NOT on Blue UAS cleared list. Not cleared for federal/DoD procurement without waiver. NDAA §848 status unverified — VERIFY before recommending for government use.
Israeli HQ. Strong US commercial customer base (utilities, energy, mining) but federal procurement requires independent NDAA review.

name: American Robotics Scout System
description: First FAA-approved fully automated drone system. Operates without a human pilot or observer present. Weatherproof dock, autonomous recharging, FAA Part 135 Air Carrier Certificate. NDAA-compliant US manufacturer. Used in agriculture, energy, and critical infrastructure inspection. Acquired by Ondas Holdings 2021.

compliance.note: Blue UAS listed. First FAA Part 135 Air Carrier for autonomous UAS. NDAA-compliant US manufacturer.
Blue UAS cleared. FAA Part 135 certificate holder.
